label: Time assignment
description: Defines a named pawn schedule slot shown in the timetable, controlling whether the pawn may rest or seek joy during that hour.

color.label: Color
color.description: Solid fill color used for this assignment in the timetable grid and the assignment selector button. Accepts integer channel values in the range 0-255.

allowRest.label: Allow rest
allowRest.description: When false, the pawn is blocked from going to bed for normal rest while this assignment is active unless their rest need falls below the critical threshold (~20%). Set to false for Work.

allowJoy.label: Allow joy
allowJoy.description: When false, the pawn's joy-seeking ThinkNode returns zero priority, preventing recreation during this assignment. Set to false for Work.

new-time-assignment.label: New time assignment
new-time-assignment.description: Minimal time assignment with a label and display color.
